text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The holiday season is nearly here...

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
The lineup for this year's Arima Kinen grand prix
looks to be a step up above usual.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap, Super Creek, and Inari One are just a
few of the Umamusume who've been bringing the
heat this year.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
There's also Yaeno Muteki and Mejiro Ardan. And
who could forget Sakura Chiyono O's miraculous
comeback!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Everyone who's defined this generation is going
to be there! Fans are calling it a dream race
worthy of the grand prix title!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is looking forward to the imminent
Arima Kinen and the holiday season. Meanwhile,
Bamboo Memory...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yeeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let's get right to it, Trainer! It's the holidays,
which means enforcing discipline is more
important than ever!
choice_data_list: Roger that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: According to Bamboo Memory, the disciplinary committee is fairly—make that extremely busy around this time of year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing that, I decide to help out with her
disciplinary committee work between our training
sessions.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You can't take the holiday season lightly! This
time of year is nuts!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The disciplinary committee has crunched the
numbers and found that rule violations go up
significantly around the holidays! We call it chaos
season!
choice_data_list: Chaos season?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I think it's easier to understand if you see for
yourself. So...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let's patrol the academy! We need to tighten the
screws, and that means being three times as loud,
three times as strict, and three times as energetic!
choice_data_list: ...Does "three" have some kind of significance?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Of course—it sounds cool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so begins our super strict holiday season.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You over there! It's against the rules to bring
a tree into the dorms without permission!

text_block_list.name: Tree-Toting Student
text_block_list.text: Oh! Bamboo! S-sorry about that!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You there! Just because a classroom is empty
doesn't mean you can use it to throw a party! You
need to get permission first!

text_block_list.name: Student with Fairy Lights
text_block_list.text:
Gyah! Where'd you come from?! A-anyway...
sorry!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Stop right there! Who said you could have a
barbecue on the roof?! Clean everything up right
this instant!

text_block_list.name: Student Holding Meat
text_block_list.text: But why?! Taiki Shuttle does it all the time!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And Air Groove yells at her every time! Do you
want me to call her over here?!

text_block_list.name: Student Holding Meat
text_block_list.text: ...I'll clean it up.

text_block_list.name: Student in Casual Clothes
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Bamboo! Thanks for all your hard work on
the disciplinary committee!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Did you get permission to leave campus?

text_block_list.name: Student in Casual Clothes
text_block_list.text:
Oh you! Of course I did! Hehehe... Now, I'm just
gonna go ahead and—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Not so fast! Your dorm leader's told me all about
your habit of sneaking out! And I know for a fact
you haven't given notice! I checked!

text_block_list.name: Student in Casual Clothes
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I should have known you would've talked
to her. There's no getting anything by you...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Phew! That should do it for today! Appreciate the
help, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Sure thing! Good work today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spent the whole day patrolling with Bamboo
Memory. Both the scale and amount of rule
violations were larger than I expected, and we've
managed to run ourselves ragged.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
See? We don't call this chaos season for nothing.
Everyone's so excited, they just do whatever they
feel like!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But that's all the more reason why I've got to do
what I can for the disciplinary committee!
choice_data_list: And why is that exactly?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I think everyone's just so excited about the
holidays that they can't help themselves!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And so it's our job to make sure everyone enjoys
the holidays safely!
choice_data_list: Spoken like a true disciplinary chair.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory is working hard on the
disciplinary committee for everyone's sake, and
I'd like to show her some appreciation.
choice_data_list:
Why don't we celebrate a job well done back in
my office?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh! Can we?! I'd love to!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: We can celebrate a job well done and the holidays at the same time! Besides, who knows when we'll get another chance to celebrate?!
choice_data_list: All right, let's go buy some cake!
All right, let's go buy some cake!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yesss! This is gonna be great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Bamboo Memory and I reward
ourselves for our hard work by enjoying the
holidays with some cake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us have a lovely time talking about all
the times we've shared!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I nearly forgot! It's not a holiday party without—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whoops! I left it in my room! And it's not even
wrapped ye—
choice_data_list: You okay?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer! Would you mind picking up the
cake by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'll meet you back in your office! Just gotta grab
something real quick, nothing to worry about!
choice_data_list: I don't really know what's going on, but okay!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm really sorry! I'll be there right away, I swear!
Just wait a bit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As requested, I go pick up a cake and then wait
for her in my office.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sorry for the wait!
choice_data_list: No worries, but is everything okay?
No worries, but is everything okay?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one who suggested we make this a holiday
party, but I totally forgot I wasn't prepared...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Trainer!
choice_data_list: Y-yes?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Happy holidays!
choice_data_list: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I figured today is the best time to give you your
present since we're celebrating and all!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I kinda had to rush a little bit with the
wrapping 'cause I wasn't ready. Anyway, it's
nothing special, but I hope you like it!
choice_data_list: Thank you! Can I open it?
Thank you! Can I open it?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I unwrap my present from Bamboo Memory and
find a super soft hand towel inside!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's beautifully decorated with an intricate
bamboo pattern, and the kanji character for
"dreams" is embroidered across one of the edges.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I've told you my dad does kendo, right? Well, he
and I both really love this brand! Their towels are
durable, soft, and super handy!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You can use it to mop up sweat, or whatever you
want, honestly. Here's hoping you get a lot of use
out of it!
choice_data_list: Thank you! I really like the embroidery.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Actually, I did that part myself!
choice_data_list: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't easy, but I had some help from Ardan!
Still, I'm glad it turned out okay!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I thought it might be a bit boring if I just gave you
a towel, so I wanted to give it my own special
touch!
choice_data_list: Thanks, Bamboo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An attack of emotion sweeps over me, and I
worry I might have to put the hand towel to use
right away!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'm so glad you like it! The look on your
face right now is the best present I could ask for!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! Now that we've exchanged presents,
let's get this party started! Thanks for all your
hard work and happy holidays!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Bamboo Memory and I reward
ourselves for our hard work by enjoying the
holidays with some cake, all the while chatting
about the times we've shared.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, I promise myself that I'll
treasure my new dream-embroidered hand towel.
